The family Apocynaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that includes over 4,000 species. Lacosteopsis schmidiana is one of the many species within this family that have been identified and classified. The classification of Lacosteopsis schmidiana is a way to understand its evolutionary relationships and place it within the broader context of plant diversity.
